Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7973 "SPACETUNNEL-8400-7973" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $8400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Space Tunnel (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $8400 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts. 2. Copies 256 bytes of data from $8430 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly. 3. Set the correct border colour. 4. Re-enables raster interrupts and timer NMIs.
All of this allows the game to start more quickly, rather than using the original start address of $7800.
